
# ΩQCS – Basel Alignment Mapping (Non-Substitutive Layer)

## Positioning

ΩQCS does NOT:
- Calculate PD (Probability of Default)
- Calculate LGD (Loss Given Default)
- Replace internal rating models
- Provide lending recommendation outputs

ΩQCS enhances structural transparency ABOVE regulated credit models.

---

## Alignment Areas

### 1. Governance & Model Risk (Basel Model Risk Principles)

ΩQCS Supports:
- Decision traceability
- Variable transparency
- Sensitivity documentation
- Audit log persistence

### 2. Capital Adequacy Transparency

ΩQCS provides:
- Structural misalignment indicators
- External regulatory impact injection visibility
- Strategic exposure mapping

### 3. Risk Escalation Clarity

ΩQCS formalizes:
- Internal structural tension
- External coefficient sensitivity
- Collision between governance structure and regulatory pressure

---

## Regulatory Boundary Doctrine

ΩQCS remains:
Non-prescriptive
Non-advisory
Non-rating substitutive

It operates as a structural visibility layer.
